name: @radzor/markdown-render
description: Convert Markdown to sanitized HTML with syntax highlighting, GFM extensions (tables, strikethrough, task lists), and frontmatter extraction. Safe for user-generated content.

inputs.name: sanitize
inputs.description: Strip unsafe HTML tags and attributes. Disable only for trusted content.

inputs.name: syntaxHighlight
inputs.description: Apply syntax highlighting to fenced code blocks.

inputs.name: allowedTags
inputs.description: Extra HTML tags to allow when sanitize is true.

outputs.name: frontmatter
outputs.description: Parsed YAML frontmatter (if present in the input).

outputs.name: plainText
outputs.description: Stripped plain-text version of the content.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on parsing or sanitization error.

actions.name: render

params.name: options
params.description: Per-call overrides for sanitize, breaks, etc.

actions.returns: Promise<{ html: string; frontmatter: Record<string, unknown> }>
actions.description: Convert Markdown to sanitized HTML and extract frontmatter.

actions.name: toPlainText
actions.description: Strip all Markdown formatting and return plain text.

actions.name: extractFrontmatter

params.name: markdown
params.description: Markdown source string with optional YAML frontmatter.

actions.description: Extract YAML frontmatter and return parsed metadata with body content.

llm.constraints: sanitize defaults to true — never disable for user-generated content. Frontmatter must be at the top of the document between --- delimiters.
